name: Warden Faye
dialogue: You wandered far from the path, traveler.
I keep watch where the brambles grow thickest — the deeper forest doesn’t take kindly to strangers.
Show me your team holds together.
preBattleLine: Faye snaps her fingers — a sapling-curled wolf bounds from the underbrush!
postDefeatDialogue: Saw a poster nailed to the old oak near the ridge — the Five Pillars Dojo is calling for challengers.
"Are You Tuff Enough?" it said. Hah. Most trainers who walk in don’t walk out.
Press on — Jin keeps the eastern thickets. Beat him and you might actually be ready.
